evidence_summary: All 7 cases reach Foundation (fdsh_ trace, bridge=http, mock=false). Cosmile renders Foundation answer faithfully (no overwrite). Generic-ness originates in Foundation (no education intent, cannot_determine for 자외선, generic clarification, no response_plan). History never sent (stateless).
next_train_recommendation: Foundation Response Plan + Clarification Planner v0.3 (Foundation-side, deterministic): education_request/skin_concern_explanation intent, concern recognition incl. 자외선, response_plan(explain_then_offer_path), concern-aware clarification_questions
Multi-turn Context Payload v0.3: Cosmile sends conversation history + Foundation accepts/uses it
JUDGE minor fix: 따끔 standalone block -> caution
